response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack and infrastructure experience with a strong background in TypeScript, cloud platforms, and developer tooling. While his AI/GenAI experience is less explicitly detailed, his contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) frameworks suggest relevant exposure. His leadership in technical projects and mentorship aligns with staff-level expectations, though deeper GenAI/RAG expertise would strengthen his fit.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js, including cloud and infrastructure work.
Proven leadership in technical projects, mentorship, and developer tooling (e.g., MCP frameworks).
Diverse experience with production-grade systems, observability, and integration across legacy and modern stacks.
concerns: Limited explicit detail on AI/GenAI production experience (e.g., RAG, vector databases, LLM optimization).
No mention of advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, though not strictly required.
Long tenure at re:cinq may raise questions about adaptability to new domains or rapid innovation.
